site.name: Jellyzap
site.description: Play the best free online games at Jellyzap — Snake, Tetris, 2048, word & wheel games, kart battles and more. No download, instant play on mobile and desktop.

hero.title: Play. Zap. Have fun!
hero.subtitle: Hundreds of free games, zero downloads. Jump straight into the action on any device.

home.seoHeading: Free online games — instant play, no download
home.seoBody: Jellyzap is a free online games portal built for kids, teens and the young at heart. Every game runs right in your browser — no installs, no waiting. Play arcade classics like Snake and Tetris, brain teasers like 2048 and Match-3, word games, Wheel of Fortune and fast kart battles on your phone, tablet or computer. New games are added all the time, all free to play and family friendly.

games.title: All games
games.subtitle: Every Jellyzap game in one place — pick one and play instantly.

category.intro: Play the best free {name} games online — instant play, no download.

footer.tagline: Free online games, made with love and a little jelly.
footer.disclaimer: Jellyzap is a free, ad-supported games portal. Games are intended for entertainment.

consent.title: We value your privacy
consent.body: We use cookies to run ads and measure traffic so we can keep Jellyzap free. You choose what to allow. Ads shown to younger players are non-personalized.
consent.necessaryDesc: Required for the site to work. Always on.
consent.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand which games you love.
consent.adsDesc: Lets us show ads that keep Jellyzap free.

about.title: About Jellyzap
body: Jellyzap is a free online games portal made for kids, teens and anyone who loves a quick, colourful game. Everything runs instantly in your browser — no downloads, no sign-ups.
Our mission is simple: bright, friendly, bite-sized games that work great on phones, tablets and computers, in your language.
We add new games regularly. Jellyzap is free to play and supported by advertising.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
body: This Privacy Policy explains how Jellyzap ("we") handles information when you use our website.
Cookies & local storage: We use local storage to remember your settings (such as sound and high scores) and, with your consent, cookies for analytics and advertising.
Analytics: With your consent we use Google Analytics to understand how the site is used. This data is aggregated and helps us improve our games.

Advertising: With your consent we display ads to keep Jellyzap free. Because our games appeal to younger audiences, advertising in the kids section is treated as child-directed and non-personalized where required by law (e.g. COPPA, GDPR).
Your choices: You can change or withdraw your consent at any time using the cookie settings link in the footer.
Contact: If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us through the website.

terms.title: Terms of Use
body: By using Jellyzap you agree to these Terms of Use.
Jellyzap and its games are provided "as is" for personal, non-commercial entertainment.
You agree not to misuse the site, attempt to disrupt it, or use it in any unlawful way.
We may update or remove games and features at any time. We are not liable for any loss arising from the use of the site.
These terms may be updated from time to time; continued use means you accept the changes.

seo.homeTitle: Jellyzap — Free Online Games | Play Instantly, No Download

seo.gamesDescription: Browse every free game on Jellyzap and play instantly in your browser — arcade, puzzle, word and action games for all ages.

notFound.title: Oops! Page not found
